## Type

- [ ] Spec change
- [ ] Documentation/example change
- [ ] Reference implementation change
- [ ] Test/CI change
- [ ] Site/packaging change

## Sync Checklist

- [ ] `SPEC.md` updated if technical behavior changed
- [ ] `llms-full.txt` updated if implementation guidance changed
- [ ] `llms.txt` updated if the high-level shape changed
- [ ] `.agents/skills/ahf/SKILL.md` updated if build-skill guidance changed
- [ ] `.agents/skills/ahf/references/REFERENCE.md` updated if registries changed
- [ ] `examples/` updated if output shape changed
- [ ] `spec/ahf-v0.1.json` updated if registries changed
- [ ] `docs/IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDES.md` updated if practical implementation guidance changed

## Verification

- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] `make verify-examples`
- [ ] `make demo`
